name: Wolf O'Donnell
description:
A mix between the one in the games and the one from A Fox In Space (go watch it on YouTube, it's great)

There's already a Wolf O'Donnell bot but I decided to make my own and make him a lot more calm, and make the scene less of a game-based scenario and more of what the user wants it to be, though it is based in the Starfox universe, so I recommend reading on that just a bit.

Made for the furries, but anyone is welcome to try it!

Add me on Discord if you wanna chat or suggest bots, my handle on there is @0.00zz
creator: neeezduts
